widgets_values: You can drag the audio from a video file instead. Use the "Trim Audio Duration" node to set your start and end point for the audio file.

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: A cinematic medium shot with crisp depth of field captures a man wearing a white shirt, dark tie, and thick glasses that frame well-defined eyes and sharp, detailed facial features. He sits in the foreground of a radio studio, wearing large headphones and speaking into a microphone, while his torso and shoulders remain almost completely still and composed, maintaining a natural and professional posture with his head slightly tilted downward. From this stable position, he gently turns his head to the right before looking directly into the camera lens, rendered with realistic pixel textures and smooth animation. Simultaneously, in the background—while preserving coherent spatial logic—another man wearing a white shirt and headphones stands up from his desk with a subtle natural motion. The entire sequence is rendered in a 1-bit pixel art masterpiece style with retro arcade graphics, defined by a high-contrast neon green and black color palette and thick pixelated outlines. The atmosphere features an omnipresent CRT monitor texture, pronounced scanlines, subtle geometric screen distortion, and a horizontal analog distortion along the upper edge of the frame. Simulated cinematic lighting is translated flawlessly through sharp pixel gradations and heavy dithering, while the original user text appears clearly pixelated at the bottom of the screen, complemented by ambient sound.

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: Medium close-up, static camera focused on a classic control room operator wearing glasses, headphones, a white shirt, and a black tie, his torso frozen in his seat, with defined and dilated eyes behind the lenses and sharply defined facial features expressing surprise and alarm, a highly detailed face. The style is strict 1-bit pixel art with dense dithering, in black and white, framed by the same rounded CRT vignette border. The operator has abruptly lifted his head toward the large data screen behind him. The main control panel, previously static, now flickers with a dense and complex error pattern. The two other operators in the background are visibly agitated; the one on the left, on the telephone, has stood up in tension, gripping the microphone tightly in his hand. The overhead hanging light has dimmed, creating deeper and more contrasted shadows. The atmosphere conveys an imminent crisis, accompanied by intermittent pixelated electronic alarm sounds. Realistic pixelated metal and fabric textures are visible, with fluid animation in the flickering data patterns.

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: Medium shot, static camera focused on a vintage control room operator wearing thick glasses, a headset with microphone, a buttoned white shirt, and a black tie, with his torso firmly frozen in place. The operator subtly lowers his head to stare at the control desk, then slowly raises his gaze forward. His eyes are clearly defined behind the lenses, with sharp facial features and a highly detailed face expressing calm concentration. The visual style is strict monochrome retro pixel art in grayscale, using dense dithering patterns, framed by a rounded CRT monitor vignette border. The background reveals a complex control room environment with large computer mainframes displaying illuminated data matrices and secondary technicians working at their respective consoles. Natural cinematic lighting adapted for pixel graphics, medium shot with depth of field, subtle natural motion restricted to the neck and facial expressions, ambient control room sound with faint electronic hum, realistic pixel textures, and smooth animation.

inputs.prompt: 3D animation style, bright daytime countryside, Inside a red vintage car driving along a rural road, a green-skinned zombie woman with shoulder-length light green hair sits in the passenger seat, her torn beige shirt worn and frayed. A male zombie with short green hair and a ripped blue shirt drives, focused on the road. The camera holds a steady medium shot from the dashboard, with soft car vibration. The engine hums steadily. The woman gazes ahead and says in a calm, slightly tired voice, “They ought to make the day the time changes the first day of summer.” The driver keeps his eyes forward, puzzled, and responds flatly, “What?” A brief pause with only the engine sound.
